subject: Chantilly
body:
Dear Jeffrey,
If you go to Chantilly, see the way the library is lit with sconces from the railing of the balcony. Interesting.
You can have lunch at the" Capitanerie", it is right there in the park.Remember that it is the place where they invented the "creme de Chantilly"...
Looking forward to see you on Tuesday, J.P.
________________________________________________________________________
Email and AIM finally together. You've gotta check out free AOL Mail! - http://mail.aol.com
